meta.name: A. A. M. Ashfatul Islam
meta.about: Frontend developer with 3+ years of experience building production web applications using React, JavaScript, and SCSS. Converted 200+ Figma designs into responsive UIs across 11 commercial products including LMS platforms, e-commerce systems, and SaaS tools. Currently building full-stack skills with Next.js, Node.js, and MongoDB.

impact: Built LevelUp LMS frontend from scratch, delivering 50+ screens within a 3-month deadline and reducing client revision cycles by 40%
Created a shared component library reused in 6 products, cutting average feature delivery time from 2 weeks to under 5 days
Delivered 11 SaaS applications serving 10,000+ active users across education, e-commerce, and legal domains
leadership: Introduced component architecture and code review standards for LevelUp LMS, followed by a 4-person dev team as the project baseline
Managed frontend delivery across 5 concurrent product launches, aligning design and engineering teams across 3 time zones

projects.name: LevelUp
projects.description: Developed 50+ screens from Figma designs; added course dashboard, progress tracking, and quiz engine serving 2,000+ students

projects.name: Aorabooks
projects.description: Designed financial reporting dashboards and invoice management UI, processing 500+ monthly transactions with real-time updates

projects.name: InfixLMS
projects.description: Optimized enrollment flows and quiz modules, improving page load speed by 35% through lazy loading and code splitting

projects.name: InfixEdu
projects.description: Added attendance, grading, and scheduling features used by 15+ educational institutions daily

projects.name: Amazcart
projects.description: Implemented product catalog with 1,000+ SKU support, cart system, and a 4-step checkout flow optimized for mobile

projects.name: Lawcham
projects.description: Streamlined case management by creating a dashboard and client portal, reducing manual lookup time by 60%

projects.name: VCard
projects.description: Created a drag-and-drop card builder with 20+ templates, live preview, and one-click sharing via QR code

projects.name: Edulia
projects.description: Produced a theme with 30+ reusable UI components, selected as the default skin for InfixEdu

projects.name: BeBooking
projects.description: Automated appointment scheduling with a calendar-based interface handling 200+ weekly bookings and email confirmations

projects.name: HelpDesk
projects.description: Launched ticket management system with priority queues, SLA tracking, and agent dashboards processing 300+ tickets/month

projects.name: Aorasoft
projects.description: Achieved 90+ Lighthouse performance score and 3x organic traffic growth on a marketing site with SEO optimization

responsibilities: Converted 200+ Figma designs into production React components spanning multiple SaaS and e-commerce products
Fixed 150+ UI bugs and performance issues, maintaining 99.5% uptime for 5 concurrently live SaaS applications
Integrated 30+ REST API endpoints with frontend state management, ensuring real-time data sync across dashboards
Collaborated with 3 designers and 4 backend engineers to deliver features on 2-week sprint cycles with zero missed deadlines
Defined responsive design standards supporting 5 breakpoints, delivering consistent UX from 320px mobile to 4K displays

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science
